response.step_by_step_log: 1. Video starts with a group dance performance to 'Cyberpunk Dead Boy'. 2. Identified the song title as 'サイバーパンクデッドボーイ' from on-screen text. 3. Searched for 'サイバーパンクデッドボーイ lyrics' and found the official composer is Maiki-P. 4. Song concludes at 03:35. 5. Remainder of the video is conversational talk.
response.global_summary: The video shows a group of Hololive VTubers performing a vocal dance cover of the song 'Cyberpunk Dead Boy' by Maiki-P, followed by a birthday celebration talk for Shiranui Flare.

scenes.description: The group of Hololive members perform a high-energy dance to 'Cyberpunk Dead Boy'. Visual cues show the performers and the event name 'Shiranui Flare Birthday Festival 2023'.
scenes.song_title: サイバーパンクデッドボーイ
